positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a celestial fox (Kitsune) sitting amidst glowing geometric constellations and deep nebula clouds. The fox should have a sleek, mythical appearance with a dramatic, flowing tail and expressive eyes. Use a bold, flat-design color palette with gradients of sapphire blue, cosmic violet, and neon gold, accented by stark white elements. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a t-shirt print. Incorporate minimal, stylized lunar phases and abstract planetary orbits around the central figure. The style should blend modern tattoo flash art with kawaii anime aesthetic, ensuring clean lines and high contrast suitable for screen printing. Vector illustration quality, ultra-detailed, glowing edges, dramatic backlighting.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, writing, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, distorted, artifact, noise, extra limbs, messy, dirty background, complex shadows, copyrighted, celebrity, realism, photorealism
